title: Asking for Directions
description: Stop a stranger on the street and find your way to a bookstore.

templates.text: Excuse me, can I ask you a quick question?
templates.hint_zh: 不好意思,可以耽誤你一下嗎?

templates.text: Do you know how to get to the central bookstore?
templates.hint_zh: 你知道中央書店怎麼去嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Oh yeah, it's not far. Walk two blocks down this street, then turn left at the traffic light.

templates.text: Two blocks down, then left. Got it. Is it on that street?
templates.hint_zh: 走兩個街區後左轉,知道了。在那條街上嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yeah, you'll see it on the right after about three minutes. There's a big red sign.

templates.text: Perfect. Is it open on Sundays?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I think so, until about six in the evening. Maybe call ahead just in case.

templates.text: I'll do that. Thanks so much for your help!
templates.hint_zh: 我會打去問,真的很感謝你!

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem, have a good one!
